sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91089" key="ptaka/la" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πτακάλα</orth> or <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πτανάκα</orth>, <sense id="n91089.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">boat-mat</tr_>, dub. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:166" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.166</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
